# pruning.prune_tree { #tspaint.pruning.prune_tree }

```python
tspaint.pruning.prune_tree(tree, emissions, Q, node_time, pi, Pget=None)
```

Prune every root of a marginal tree and aggregate the results.

Aggregates ``γ``, ``ξ``, root marginals, missing-info tags and the total
log-likelihood over all roots (a marginal tree may be a forest; CLAUDE.md §3.1, §4).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**tree**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[Tree](`tskit.Tree`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The marginal tree.

<code>[**emissions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [array_like](`array_like`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-tip emission vectors (labelled refs and queries).

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   CTMC generator (rows sum to zero).

<code>[**node_time**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Node times, indexed by node id.

<code>[**pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K,) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Root frequencies.

<code>[**Pget**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[callable](`callable`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Transition-matrix cache (:func:`_transition_cache`) shared across trees in a sweep, so ``expm(Q t)`` is computed once per distinct branch length per EM iteration rather than once per tree (CLAUDE.md §3.3). Built fresh if omitted.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[PruneResult](`tspaint.pruning.PruneResult`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Posteriors aggregated over all roots of the tree.
